request.description: Verify the server is up. Returns `{"status":"ok"}`.
Register a new user. Saves `token` and `user_id` to collection variables automatically.
Attempt to register with an already-registered email. Expects 400.
Missing name and password — expects 400 with field-level errors.
Login with email and password. Saves `token` and `user_id` to collection variables.
Login with the seed user (inserted by scripts/seed.sql). Useful to explore pre-seeded project and tasks.
Attempt login with wrong password — expects 401.
Hit a protected route with no token — expects 401.
List all projects the current user owns or has tasks in. Supports `?page=` and `?limit=` pagination.

originalRequest.description: List all projects the current user owns or has tasks in. Supports `?page=` and `?limit=` pagination.

request.description: Create a new project. The authenticated user becomes the owner. Saves `project_id` automatically.

response.name: 201 Created

originalRequest.description: Create a new project. The authenticated user becomes the owner. Saves `project_id` automatically.

request.description: Get a single project by ID, including all its tasks embedded in the response.

originalRequest.description: Get a single project by ID, including all its tasks embedded in the response.
Get a single project by ID, including all its tasks embedded in the response.

request.description: Partially update a project's name and/or description. Only the project owner can do this (403 otherwise).

response.name: 403 Forbidden (Non-owner)

originalRequest.description: Partially update a project's name and/or description. Only the project owner can do this (403 otherwise).

request.description: Returns task counts grouped by status and by assignee for the project.

originalRequest.description: Returns task counts grouped by status and by assignee for the project.

request.description: Delete a project and ALL its tasks. Owner-only (403 for others). Returns 204 No Content.

List tasks for a project. Optional filters:
- `?status=todo` | `in_progress` | `done`
- `?assignee=<uuid>`
- `?page=` and `?limit=` for pagination

originalRequest.description:
List tasks for a project. Optional filters:
- `?status=todo` | `in_progress` | `done`
- `?assignee=<uuid>`
- `?page=` and `?limit=` for pagination

request.description: Filter tasks assigned to the currently logged-in user. Uses the `user_id` variable auto-set at login.

Create a task inside a project. Saves `task_id` automatically.

**Fields:**
- `title` (required)
- `description` (optional)
- `status`: `todo` | `in_progress` | `done` (default: `todo`)
- `priority`: `low` | `medium` | `high` (default: `medium`)
- `assignee_id`: UUID of a user (optional)
- `due_date`: `YYYY-MM-DD` format (optional)

originalRequest.description:
Create a task inside a project. Saves `task_id` automatically.

**Fields:**
- `title` (required)
- `description` (optional)
- `status`: `todo` | `in_progress` | `done` (default: `todo`)
- `priority`: `low` | `medium` | `high` (default: `medium`)
- `assignee_id`: UUID of a user (optional)
- `due_date`: `YYYY-MM-DD` format (optional)

request.description: Create a task with only a title. Status defaults to `todo`, priority to `medium`.

Partially update a task. All fields are optional — only include what you want to change.

Updatable fields: `title`, `description`, `status`, `priority`, `assignee_id`, `due_date`
Delete a task. Only the project owner can delete tasks. Returns 204 No Content.
